blended.narrative: Cypress Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,003 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
